title: Introduction and Review Scope
objective: Establish the review motivation, scope, and the evidence base that the selected structure will organize.

title: Factor Taxonomy and Contextual Drivers
objective: Organize the review around variable-centered factors and explain how the strongest contextual drivers shape the evidence base.

title: Factor Focus: Design Factors
objective: Synthesize the design factors evidence cluster across 6 studies, highlighting 0 gap signals and 0 contradiction signals.

title: Comparative Factor Evidence and Interactions
objective: Compare the strongest factor themes, emphasizing interaction patterns, shared covariates, and variable-level gaps.

title: Research Gaps and Opportunities
objective: Present 1 verified gap and explain how they shape the next research agenda.

title: Conclusion
objective: Summarize the selected taxonomy, the strongest synthesis themes, and the main future directions implied by the evidence base.
